emails.subject: RE: Job Duties
emails.body: RE: Job Duties Mike, what projects do we have going on in the Business Objects report? Thanks. Lynn To: Blair, Lynn

emails.body: RE: Job Duties Mike, what projects do we have going on in the Business Objects report? Thanks. Lynn To: Blair, Lynn

emails.subject: RE: Job Duties
emails.body: I am in the process of getting a list together of data elements Gas Logistics would want to have available in a universe. Also, there is an upgrade of Business Objects underway which involves utilization of new server and I have been involved in testing reports using the upgrade.
